name: Modulr
description: Modulr — UK and EU payments-as-a-service platform offering BACS, Faster Payments, SEPA, and virtual account APIs for fintechs.

seo.title: Modulr — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Modulr: Modulr — UK and EU payments-as-a-service platform offering BACS, Faster Payments, SEPA, and virtual account APIs for fintechs.

when_to_use: Faster Payments, BACS, and SEPA API for UK/EU fintech payment products
Virtual account issuance for UK e-money institutions and neobanks
Payment-as-a-service infrastructure for UK fintech building payment flows
Automated payroll and disbursement via Modulr for UK HR or gig platforms

pros: BACS, Faster Payments, and SEPA in one API
Purpose-built for fintech embedded use cases
cons: UK and EU scope — no broader global
Compliance lift to onboard as agent
review.verdict: Top UK/EU payments-as-a-service for fintechs needing bank rails and virtual accounts — not card acquiring.
review.best_for: UK and EU fintechs needing bank transfer rails and virtual accounts

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
